title: Madamigella di Maupin
writer: José Gutiérrez Maesso, Théophile Gautier, Luigi Magni
actors: Catherine Spaak, Robert Hossein, Tomas Milian
plot: Mlle de Maupin escapes from her uncle's castle, invaded by Hungarian troops, under the guise of a clergyman named Theodore. An army recruiter forces Theodore to enlist in the King's army, and not even the religious robe is an insu...
